title: Command RPC /gettransactions not work

---

# Original Description
Impossible get information and blob for on TX include on blockchain or poolstate

curl --connect-timeout 1 10.90.162.142:19004/gettransactions  -d '{"txs_hashes" : "024b64904ee62f622a756ef3ca76da5ad86bb3abcc00d72f7"}' 
{
  "status": "OK"
}
curl --connect-timeout 1 10.90.162.142:19004/gettransactions  -d '{"txs_hashes" : "bullshit"}' 
{
  "status": "OK"
}
curl --connect-timeout 1 10.90.162.142:19004/gettransactions  -d '{"params":{"txs_hashes" : "024b64904ee62f622a756ef3ca76da5ad86bb3abcc00d72f7"}}' 
{
  "status": "OK"
}
curl --connect-timeout 1 10.90.162.142:19004/gettransactions  -d '{"params":{"bullshit" : "024b64904ee62f622a756ef3ca76da5ad86bb3abcc00d72f7"}}' 
{
  "status": "OK"
}


# Discussion History
## perl5577 | 2015-01-11T12:02:56+00:00
Thanks warptangent,
Need used List for txs_hashes

 curl --connect-timeout 1 10.90.162.142:19004/gettransactions  -d '{"txs_hashes" : ["024b64904ee62f622a756ef3ca76da5ad86bb3abcc00d72f773dd20b9a2df207"]}' 
{
  "status": "OK",
  "txs_as_hex": [""]
}


## fluffypony | 2015-01-11T13:40:35+00:00
Please don't use the HTTP interface. It's NOT an RPC interface for general use, it's for daemon <-> wallet communication, and is being replaced. We won't support the deprecated HTTP interface, although the JSON RPC API will remain supported even in its current form for quite some time.


# Action History
- Created by: perl5577 | 2015-01-11T11:55:52+00:00
